fn validate_batch(items: &[Item]) -> Result<(), Vec<String>> {
    // GOOD: allocate error vec only on first error
    let mut errors: Option<Vec<String>> = None;
    for item in items {
        if item.quantity == 0 {
            errors
                .get_or_insert_with(Vec::new)
                .push(format!("item {} has zero quantity", item.id));
        }
        if item.price < 0.0 {
            errors
                .get_or_insert_with(Vec::new)
                .push(format!("item {} has negative price", item.id));
        }
    }
    match errors {
        Some(errs) => Err(errs),
        None => Ok(()),
    }
}

struct Item {
    id: u64,
    quantity: u32,
    price: f64,
}
